products_list.name: 21k HIMO Gold Ounce Frame (bezel) - 3 row
products_list.description:
This premium 21K solid gold bezel frame is specifically crafted to encase and hold a standard 1 oz PAMP Suisse Minted Gold Bar (or equivalent 1 oz minted bullion bars), converting your physical investment gold into a stunning wearable piece of fine jewelry.
Compatible Bar Dimensions:
• Weight: 1 Troy Ounce (31.10 Grams)
• Length: 41.0 mm
• Width: 24.0 mm
• Thickness: 1.71 mm
Note: Gold bar not included. The frame comes with secure bezel prongs that can be gently folded over to lock your bar safely in place.

products_list.name: 21k Gold Coin (Lira) Frame (bezel) - Etched
products_list.description:
This premium 21K solid gold coin bezel frame is masterfully designed to encase and secure standard 22 mm gold bullion coins. It is a perfect fit for both the historic Turkish Reşat (Rashadi) gold coin and the iconic British Sovereign (English Gold Sovereign).
Compatible Coin Dimensions:
• Fits Coin Diameters: 22.0 mm to 22.1 mm
• Fits Coins Such As:
  - Turkish Reşat Altın / Rashadi Coin (22.0 mm diameter, 7.21g)
  - British Gold Sovereign / English Gold Coin (22.05 mm diameter, 7.98g)
Note: Coins sold separately. The frame features secure bezel prongs that can be gently folded over to lock your historical bullion coin safely in place, transforming it into a stunning wearable heirloom.

products_list.name: 21k HIMO Gold Mkhamas (5 coin) Coin Frame (bezel)
products_list.description:
This premium 21K solid gold coin bezel frame is masterfully hand-crafted to secure and showcase large-scale gold bullion coins. It is a perfect fit for the English Mkhamas (British 5 Sovereign / Five Pounds), the Turkish Mkhamas (5 Lira Reşat Altın / Beşli), and the legendary Mexican 50 Pesos (Centenario) gold coin.
Compatible Coin Dimensions:
• Fits Coin Diameters: 35.0 mm to 37.1 mm
• Fits Coins Such As:
  - Turkish Mkhamas Coin / 5 Lira Reşat (35.0 mm diameter, 36.08g)
  - English Mkhamas Coin / British 5 Sovereign (36.02 mm diameter, 39.94g)
  - Mexican 50 Pesos / Centenario Gold Coin (37.1 mm diameter, 41.67g)
Note: Coins sold separately. This frame features reinforced 21K solid gold bezel prongs specifically designed to safely support the heavy weight of these large bullion coins, allowing you to wear them securely as a luxury statement pendant.
